prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A large medieval shield in the center, divided into six segments like a puzzle. Each segment is a different color and labeled with a strict flag: "strictNullChecks" (blue), "noImplicitAny" (orange), "strictFunctionTypes" (green), "strictBindCallApply" (purple), "noImplicitThis" (red), "strictPropertyInitialization" (yellow). On the left, the segments are shown scattered and separate (strict: false), leaving gaps. On the right, all segments click together into a complete, glowing shield (strict: true). A banner across the top reads "strict: true = all flags combined". The assembled shield radiates a protective aura.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
